name: Context Passport
description: A personal context layer MCP server — carry your profile across any AI tool without re-explaining yourself every session.
author: karanhanda5

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Get the user's full personal context — name, role, expertise, goals, work style, and current project. Call this at the start of any session to understand who you're talking to.

tools.name: update_context
tools.description: Update one or more fields of the user's context. Only pass the fields you want to change — everything else stays as-is.

tools.name: get_current_project
tools.description: Get just the user's current project — name, description, status, and next steps.

tools.name: sync_from_github
tools.description: Pull your latest GitHub activity into Context Passport — repos, languages, and open pull requests. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Optional. GitHub Personal Access Token for the sync_from_github tool. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope.
